title: senecio palmatus var. cannabifolius
intro: Senecio palmatus var. cannabifolius, also known as Japanese St. John's Wort or Hemp-leaf Ragwort, is a variant of the Senecio palmatus plant native to East Asia. This plant contains senecio alkaloids, which have been traditionally used for their medicinal properties, including antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Senecio palmatus var. cannabifolius include its potential to treat skin conditions, such as eczema and acne, as well as its ability to boost the immune system and reduce stress. Traditionally, the plant has been prepared for medicinal use through infusion, tincture, or topical application, although its use is not without risk and should be approached with caution.
